query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ratingMoodys IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comRating,
  MAX(dataReferencia) as ultimaData,
  MIN(dataReferencia) as primeiraData
FROM spread_analysis;
